name: Carne Asada y Naranjas
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Thinly cut beef skirt steaks
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound meat with side of saucer to tenderize, if needed. Cut meat into serving pieces.
2. Place steaks in a bowl; pour orange juice over the meat. Marinate at room temperature for 3 hours or in the refrigerator overnight.
3. Drain the marinade and reserve it. Grill the meat and orange slices until desired doneness is reached.
4. Heat the reserved orange juice marinade to serve as sauce.
